column3: Req Desc
column5: TC Desc

column3: User Registration & Authentication (Actor: Guest; Customer; Property Owner; System)
column5: Verify successful registration/login/refresh and handle invalid credentials, existing users, and unauthorized public role registrations.

column3: Digital KYC & User Profile Management (Actor: Customer; Property Owner; Admin; Authenticated User)
column5: Verify ID uploads, profile updates, Admin approvals/rejections, handle missing compulsory KYC documents, invalid files, and soft deletion constraints.

column3: Multi-tier Property Inventory Management (Actor: Property Owner; Admin; Sales Agent)
column5: Verify property drafting, Admin approval and Agent assignment workflows, handle missing mandatory data, test state reversion on Owner updates, and verify property filtering by multiple statuses.

column3: Property Search, Filtering & Favorites (Actor: Public; Customer)
column5: Verify filtering properties by location, price, area, orientation, add/remove favorites, handle invalid params, and block access to soft-deleted/unavailable properties.

column3: Viewing Appointment Lifecycle (Actor: Customer; Sales Agent; Admin)
column5: Verify appointment booking, agent assignment, completion, rating system, prevent booking sold/rented properties, and handle 30-minute buffer window conflicts.

column3: Deposit Contract Generation & Workflow (Actor: Sales Agent; Admin; Customer; Property Owner)
column5: Verify DRAFT deposit creation, approval to WAITING_OFFICIAL, payment generation, ACTIVE transition, block duplicate contracts, and test Customer/Owner cancellations.

column3: Smart Rental & Purchase Contract Workflow (Actor: Sales Agent; Admin)
column5: Verify linking DRAFT to ACTIVE Deposit, validating prices, paperwork completion, terminal state transitions, mismatched deposit prevention, and security deposit management.

column3: Integrated Payment Processing (Collections) (Actor: Customer; Property Owner; System)
column5: Verify PayOS checkout generation, SUCCESS webhook processing, status updates, handle invalid webhook signatures, duplicate payment attempts, and late penalty generation.

column3: Payouts & Internal Settlements (Actor: Accountant; Admin; System)
column5: Verify manual Salary/Bonus status updates, auto-generation of Owner Payouts, handle missing Bank Account alerts, and trigger Customer refunds mid-flight.

column3: Violation Reporting & Moderation (Actor: Authenticated User; Admin)
column5: Verify reporting properties/users with evidence, Admin application of penalties, notification dispatch, invalid target handling, and safe report dismissal.

column3: Analytics, Ranking & Dashboards (Actor: Admin; System)
column5: Verify rendering financial distributions, auto-calculating Lead Scores/Performance Tiers, block future year requests, and execute correct month-end salary recalculations.

column3: Authentication & JWT Token Management (Actor: System; Authenticated User)
column5: Verify token grant access, 401 on expiration, successful refresh flows, and proper rejection of malformed, tampered, or incorrectly typed tokens.

column3: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) (Actor: System)
column5: Verify role-specific route protection (Admin stats, Agent contracts, Customer viewings) and prevent cross-role actions like Customer approvals or Agent contract voiding.

column3: Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) Prevention (Actor: Customer; Property Owner; Sales Agent)
column5: Verify users can fetch own resources, prevent unauthorized UUID queries against notifications/payments, while permitting Property Owners to query owned property payments.

column3: Webhook Signature Verification (Actor: Payment Gateway (Payway/PayOS); System)
column5: Verify payloads with valid HMAC-SHA256 signatures are processed correctly and forcefully reject any missing or mismatched signature requests with 401. Added: TC-4.1.4-06 for Replay Attack prevention via timestamp validation.

column3: Secure File Uploads (Actor: System; Authenticated User)
column5: Verify Cloudinary upload constraints for images and PDFs, enforce MULTIPART_MAX_FILE_SIZE, and reject executable scripts masked as images.

column3: Payment Gateway Integration State Integrity (Actor: System; Payment Gateway)
column5: Verify Idempotency-Key headers prevent duplicate payment sessions and handle upstream gateway timeouts gracefully via PaywayServerException.

column3: Asynchronous Push Notifications (FCM) (Actor: System; Firebase)
column5: Verify NotificationServiceImpl dispatches async FCM pushes on state changes without blocking, and handles invalid FCM tokens by marking as FAILED.

column3: Automated Schedulers & Cron Jobs (Actor: System (Schedulers))
column5: Verify RentalContractScheduler generates 1st-of-month payments, ranking schedulers fire at midnight, and latePaymentPenaltyRate applies correctly to overdue balances. Added: TC-5.1.3-09 for downtime recovery; TC-5.1.3-10 for Feb/Leap year handling.

column3: Contract State Machine Integrity (Actor: System)
column5: Verify rigid sequence adherence (DRAFT -> WAITING_OFFICIAL -> PENDING_PAYMENT -> ACTIVE) and lock out invalid skips or transitions from terminal states. Added: TC-5.1.4-08 for concurrency safety; TC-5.1.4-09 for distributed state consistency.
